<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/conventions"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns a list of all Eurofurence conventions ordered by year (ascending).

This endpoint is public and does not require authentication.

  parameters={undefined}
